sections.content:
The game is over! The blocks are at cols 49-53, rows 20-21. The level is complete.
Looking at the progression:
- After 8 UP: cols 34-38, rows 5-6
- After 3 RIGHT: cols 49-53, rows 5-6
- After 5 DOWN: cols 49-53, rows 20-21
- Level completed: True (implied by "The game is over")
So the goal was to navigate the blocks to the position cols 49-53, rows 20-21. This is in the right passage at the top horizontal area.
The path was: UP 8 times → RIGHT 3 times → DOWN 5 times.
The game is over, so I should check if this is the end of the game or just the end of level 2.

sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check if the game is complete
print("Last action result:", last_action_result)
print("Current level:", current_frame.level)
print("Current step:", current_frame.step)

# Check segmentation for any changes
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['O', 'b', 'W', 'w']:
        print(f"{n['color']}: boundary={n['boundary']}, pixels={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Game is over but run is not complete. Try an action to see if game continues.
result = action(['UP'])
print("Result:", result)
print("Level:", current_frame.level)
print("Step:", current_frame.step)
</parameter>
</function>
